tools.name: logTime
tools.description: Log a time entry for a user with hours, date, and billing status.

tools.name: getTimesheetSummary
tools.description: Aggregate time entries for a user over a date range to produce a timesheet summary.

tools.name: listTimeEntries
tools.description: List and filter time entries by user, project, brief, or date range.

tools.name: requestLeave
tools.description: Create a new leave request for a user.

tools.name: approveLeave
tools.description: Approve, reject, or cancel a leave request.

tools.name: getLeaveBalance
tools.description: Get leave balance for a user by year.

tools.name: listLeaveRequests
tools.description: List leave requests with optional status filters.

tools.name: manageLeaveTypes
tools.description: Create, update, or list leave types for the organization.

tools.name: listHolidays
tools.description: List public holidays for the organization.

tools.name: addHoliday
tools.description: Add a new public holiday for the organization.

tools.name: manageBlackoutPeriods
tools.description: Create or list blackout periods during which leave is restricted.

tools.name: manageEmployeeDocuments
tools.description: Upload or list employee documents such as contracts, IDs, and certifications.
